author: ajdapretnar
text:
##### Issue

Legend can get very big and is useless in parts.

[![Screen Shot 2019-04-12 at 12 35 37](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/12524972/56033847-bdbd8c80-5d25-11e9-988c-55136c5348be.png)](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/12524972/56033847-bdbd8c80-5d25-11e9-988c-55136c5348be.png)

##### Fixes

* Remove Size from legend. The current implementation is useless and other solutions are only marginally better.
* Limit the number of shape values to 5. 9 is too much. Also they should be the same as in core Orange. See [Legend and Size setting: don't show more than 5 values orange3#3748](https://github.com/biolab/orange3/issues/3748).
* Have better continuous legend. Either copy Scatter Plot ('discretize' colors) or have it them same as in Choropleth, which is really nice (allows you to define custom color steps).

text: Fixed in [#77](https://github.com/biolab/orange3-geo/pull/77), with the new widget based on Scatter Plot.
